title: checkout-api DB errors — connection timeouts
lastMessage: The checkout-api pods are all reporting 'HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 30000ms'. The database connection pool is at max_connections=10 and we deployed a new feature flag last night that doubled concurrent checkout workers from 5 to 20. Pool is exhausted. Immediate fix: increase max_connections in HikariCP config to 50 or reduce worker concurrency.

title: RDS postgres max_connections investigation
lastMessage: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity shows 97 active connections against a max_connections=100 limit on the RDS instance. Connection pool exhaustion is confirmed. The spike correlates with a feature flag rollout at 09:30 UTC.

title: K8s node autoscaler discussion
lastMessage: Scaling policy updated for node pool. Unrelated to current incidents.
